codeReview.summary: Feature is verification-only - the Apple Music button implementation already existed in App.tsx (lines 361-370). The worker correctly verified all three expected behaviors through browser inspection. Implementation uses Button with asChild prop and disabled={!album} to correctly control enabled/disabled state. When album is present, it renders an anchor tag (<a>) with href={album?.apple_music_url}, target='_blank' for new tab behavior, and rel='noreferrer' for security. The buttonVariants CSS class includes 'disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-60' ensuring proper disabled state styling.

summary: PASS - All expected behaviors for VAL-CROSS-010 are correctly implemented: (1) Button is enabled when album is loaded - disabled prop binds to !albumso when album data exists, button is interactive. (2) Clicking opens new tab with Apple Music URL - anchor tag uses target='_blank' with正确的 href binding to album?.apple_music_url. (3) Button is disabled when album is null - disabled=!album correctly disables and opacity-60/pointer-events-none styling applies. Worker performed browser inspection confirming the href resolves to a valid Apple Music URL (https://music.apple.com/de/album/...). Lint and build both pass. No code changes were needed for this verification feature.
